summary: Reposted Fox News interview segment with Vice President JD Vance, a bearded man in a dark suit and light purple tie, seated before an American flag and an ornate gold-detailed wall. A red lower-third banner reads 'EXCLUSIVE' and 'DEAL OR NO DEAL / TRUMP DEMANDS IRAN END NUCLEAR PROGRAM' with a 'BREAKING TONIGHT' tag; a 'COMING UP' promo box sits at upper right. The audio is the interviewer and Vance discussing red lines on Iran and its nuclear program. No music bed.

script.scene: VP JD Vance seated before a US flag and gold wall, light purple tie; chyron 'DEAL OR NO DEAL / TRUMP DEMANDS IRAN END NUCLEAR PROGRAM,' 'EXCLUSIVE' tag.
